chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-2482 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.11685 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 5. 3. For orders on Misc. No.11686 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For orders on Misc. No.11687 of 2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case. 02.07.2025 Mr. Abdul Fatah Jalbani, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. In the instant case, the challan has been submitted against the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant Petition and submits that he will approach the learned trial Court for filing an application under Section 249-A or 265-K Cr.P.C. Accordingly, the instant Petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
